label: Boston (Logan)
covers: Suffolk County (Boston, Chelsea, Revere, Winthrop); Norfolk County (Brookline, Quincy, Milton, Newton, Wellesley, Needham); central/east Middlesex (Cambridge, Somerville, Medford, Arlington, Lexington, Waltham, Watertown, Newton); Essex County south/North Shore (Beverly, Salem, Lynn, Marblehead, Gloucester, Rockport)
note: Reference station for greater Boston metro. ASHRAE Fundamentals 2021 99%/1% dry-bulb; NOAA Climate Normals HDD/CDD base 65°F.

label: Worcester
covers: Worcester County central (Worcester, Auburn, Holden, Shrewsbury, Westborough, Southborough, Hopkinton, Northborough, Grafton, Webster, Charlton, Spencer, Sutton, Uxbridge)
note: Higher elevation than Boston; colder winters and milder summers. Use for inland Worcester County.

label: Springfield (Bradley)
covers: Hampden County (Springfield, Chicopee, Holyoke, Westfield, Agawam, West Springfield); Hampshire County (Northampton, Amherst, Easthampton, South Hadley); Franklin County (Greenfield, Deerfield, Montague)
note: Pioneer Valley. Bradley International (CT border) is closest reliable ASHRAE station.

label: Pittsfield (Berkshires)
covers: Berkshire County (Pittsfield, North Adams, Williamstown, Lenox, Great Barrington, Stockbridge, Adams, Lee, Dalton, Williamstown)
note: Climate Zone 6A — coldest part of MA. Triggers tighter envelope requirements per IECC Table R402.1.3.

label: New Bedford
covers: Bristol County (New Bedford, Fall River, Taunton, Attleboro, Dartmouth, Westport, Fairhaven, Mansfield, Norton, Easton, Raynham, Seekonk, Somerset, Swansea)
note: Coastal southeast MA; milder winters than inland.

label: Hyannis (Cape Cod)
covers: Barnstable County all (Barnstable, Falmouth, Bourne, Sandwich, Mashpee, Yarmouth, Dennis, Brewster, Harwich, Chatham, Orleans, Eastham, Wellfleet, Truro, Provincetown)
note: Cape Cod marine climate; warmest winter design temp in MA at 14°F.

label: Nantucket
covers: Nantucket County (Nantucket); Dukes County (Edgartown, Oak Bluffs, Tisbury, West Tisbury, Chilmark, Aquinnah, Gosnold)

label: Gardner (North-Central)
covers: Worcester County north-central (Gardner, Athol, Templeton, Winchendon, Hubbardston, Phillipston, Royalston, Hardwick, Barre, Petersham, Westminster)

label: Fitchburg / Leominster
covers: Worcester County northwest (Fitchburg, Leominster, Lunenburg, Lancaster, Harvard, Princeton, Ashburnham); Middlesex northwest (Ayer, Groton, Pepperell, Townsend, Westford, Shirley)

label: Lawrence / Merrimack Valley
covers: Essex County north (Lawrence, Methuen, Haverhill, Andover, North Andover, Newburyport, Amesbury, Salisbury, Boxford, Georgetown, Groveland, Newbury, Rowley, West Newbury); Middlesex north (Lowell, Billerica, Chelmsford, Dracut, Tewksbury, Tyngsborough, Dunstable)
note: Merrimack Valley; colder than Boston due to inland location.

label: Marshfield (South Shore)
covers: Plymouth County most (Plymouth, Marshfield, Duxbury, Hingham, Hanover, Norwell, Scituate, Hull, Cohasset, Pembroke, Halifax, Hanson, Whitman, Abington, Rockland, Bridgewater, East Bridgewater, Middleborough, Carver, Kingston, Lakeville, Plympton)
note: South Shore coastal MA. Cohasset (technically Norfolk County) also routes here per energy-calc.html.
